summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dustbin locator app. Backend APIs fully functional (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI flows working with minor marker display timing issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Dustbin markers not immediately visible on map after adding via admin dashboard
ui_bugs.details: Markers may require map refresh or user location to be set for proper display

passed_tests: Admin login rejection with invalid credentials
Add dustbin modal and form submission
Navigation between map and admin pages

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (23/24 UI tests passed, 1 minor timing issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Ensure dustbin markers refresh/display immediately on map after CRUD operations in admin dashboard. Consider adding map.invalidateSize() or re-fetching dustbins after navigation to map view.
